programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: A deputy and his K9 wade through the murky waters of a Georgia swamp to catch a submerged felon; in Louisiana's Cajun country, a suspect escapes into a gator-filled bayou; a man accused of armed robbery takes the plunge, and a deputy dons his heroic cape to save a drowning pup.

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: In Florida, troopers risk life and limb wading through gator-infested swamps to track a suspect; a thief in Georgia is close to becoming gator feed to evade capture; a man acting erratically makes a surprising getaway and a gator comes between a woman and her pizza.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country; a tenant and her landlord have a dispute with poop; a cowboy rides his horse on a busy highway; an impaired man drives with a traffic light on his car and more!

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A look at some strange arrests from across the country; police find a raccoon with a meth pipe in a woman's car; a man is arrested while paying his taxes; a landscaper drives a tractor into a cop car; and more!

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A look at some strange arrests from across the country; in Vegas, a man gets naked on top of a poker table; a mom fires multiple rounds at a police station; a citizen dressed in a poop emoji protests in court; and more!

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: Two women are arrested for allegedly stealing 17 baseball bats; a reality show star is arrested for DUI; a couple is thrown out of a renaissance festival for disturbing a juggler.

programme.title: Storage Wars Texas

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy confuses profit with prophet but still manages to climb his way to success; Kenny tries to honor the history of San Bernardino, Calif., recording a win along the way; Brandi shows her literary prowess volume by volume.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: It's a regular father and son shootout in Victorville, Calif., as Ivy and Pops try to prove who among them is the most profitable; Brandi's secret weapon lands her more than she bargained for, but luckily Kenny is there to brighten her day.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi hope a special guest can sniff out the best lockers in West Covina, Calif.; Darrell and Brandon help their colleagues dress for success; Mary looks for vintage items.

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: After relying on the breakdown service one too many times, Frasier and Niles take a car maintenance class. And when Roz gets a puppy, Martin takes over the training.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles try to revitalise the career of their boyhood actor idol, only to learn that he stinks. With Sir Derek Jacobi and Patrick Macnee.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In Indiana, Mike finds a 1950s wagon that he can't leave without. And on a musical mission, the guys scour a farm with more than just chickens and pigs.

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Channel 4's midday news summary.

programme.title: Car S.O.S
programme.desc: Can Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend restore Barbara's treasured but decaying 1978 Bedford HA ice cream van to its former glory.

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village

programme.title: Countdown

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Leah Charles-King helps builder James and childcare practitioner Laura to find a permanent home in the Valencian countryside for their £90k budget.

programme.title: Narrow Escapes
programme.desc: Canal closures threaten Debs and Mick's journey to the aisle. And we meet Naomi, and her floppy-eared first mate, as she launches her floating shop.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: At Château du Puits Es Pratx, Tim and Sasha create a bespoke wine store. And a new chateau family, the Hutsons, get to work renovating their hallway.

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Channel 4's flagship news programme. Including the weather.

programme.title: The Mountbattens: A Scandalous Marriage

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: A night at Mike's piano bar gives Monica her moment in the spotlight. Chandler utilises his secret skill to repair Joey's botched eyebrow-waxing job.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe and Joey deliberately set up Ross and Rachel on bad dates, hoping they'll get back together. Monica and Chandler babysit Emma.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross and Phoebe are mugged outside Central Perk. Joey gets a part in a stage play in a painful way. Chandler starts his new career as an advertising writer.
